question_text: Which of the following correctly describes the arrangement of particles in a solid?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles are loosely packed and move freely in all directions

options.label: B
options.text: Particles are tightly packed in a fixed arrangement and vibrate in fixed positions

options.label: C
options.text: Particles are spread far apart with no forces between them

options.label: D
options.text: Particles are randomly arranged and collide constantly with each other

explanation: In solids, particles are tightly packed together in a regular pattern and can only vibrate around fixed positions. This is why solids have a definite shape and volume.
